tasks.title: Local Ollama benchmarking and runtime parameter expansion
tasks.notes: 2026-04-07 已完成新一轮 Ollama 本地优化任务：1) 在当前 RTX 5060 8GB 机器上完成 `llama3.2:3b`、`gemma4:e2b`、`gemma4:latest` 与 `1024/2048/4096 num_ctx` 的本地压测，报告见 `.automation/reports/ollama-local-benchmark-20260407.json`；2) 给出当前机器推荐默认档：`gemma4:e2b` + `Q4_K_M` + `num_ctx=2048`，速度优先备选为 `llama3.2:3b` + `Q4_K_M` + `num_ctx=2048`；3) 在现有 `num_ctx / keep_alive / num_predict / top_k / top_p` 之外新增 `temperature / min_p / stop / think`，并为所有暴露参数提供显式默认值；4) 已完成后端定向单测、前端定向单测、frontend build、源码态浏览器检查，以及真实 `/api/admin/llm/test/active` 请求验证。计划报告：`.automation/reports/MANUAL-20260407-OLLAMA-BENCH-EXPANSION-PLAN-20260407.md`；开发报告：`.automation/reports/MANUAL-20260407-OLLAMA-BENCH-EXPANSION-DEV-20260407.md`。

tasks.notes: 2026-04-07 已完成 Ollama 高级运行参数扩展：1) `LLM 设置` 页新增并回显 `num_ctx`、`keep_alive`、`num_predict`、`top_k`、`top_p`；2) 后端 `OllamaProvider` 切到原生 `/api/chat`，并正式写入 `options` 与 `keep_alive`，同时修复 `keep_alive=-1` 需要以数字而不是字符串发送的问题；3) 本机用户环境变量已更新为 `OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1`、`OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE=q8_0`、`OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1`、`OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH=2048`，并重启本地 Ollama 服务；4) 通过 admin API 把当前 `ollama` provider 默认值改为 `ollamaNumCtx=2048`、`ollamaKeepAlive=-1`。验证：`dotnet test ... --filter FullyQualifiedName~OllamaProviderTests` 通过，`dotnet test ... --filter FullyQualifiedName~JsonFileLlmSettingsStoreTests` 通过，`npm --prefix .\frontend run test:unit -- src/modules/admin/AdminLlmSettings.spec.js` 17/17 通过，source validation 通过 `node frontend/scripts/edge-check-ollama-settings.mjs` 确认页面可见新字段且 console error 为 0，`POST /api/admin/llm/test/active` 返回成功响应。运行态最终基线：`ollama ps` 显示 `CONTEXT=2048`、`UNTIL=Forever`，但仍只有约 `75%/25% CPU/GPU`，单流 decode 约 `38.62 tok/s`，说明当前机器的主瓶颈仍是显存不足导致的部分 CPU 回退，而不是参数缺失。规划报告：`.automation/reports/MANUAL-20260407-OLLAMA-ADVANCED-SETTINGS-PLAN-20260407.md`；开发报告：`.automation/reports/MANUAL-20260407-OLLAMA-ADVANCED-SETTINGS-DEV-20260407.md`。

tasks.title: Daily TD sequential lag fix
tasks.notes: 2026-03-24 已完成日 K 九转滞后修正。排查结论：前端 `chartStrategyRegistry.js` 与后端 `StockCopilotMcpService.CalculateTdSequential(...)` 都采用严格 `>` / `<`，当 `close == close[4]` 时直接重置计数；这在 A 股常见的 0.01 价位台阶里会吞掉 setup bar，导致相对常见九转口径慢 1-2 根。前端还存在一个附带问题：同方向连续趋势在到达 9 后会立即重新起算，容易生成重复 setup。现已统一为“相等收盘沿用当前 setup 方向、计数可推进到 9，但同方向到 9 后不重复继续发新标记”。验证包括前端单测 `npm --prefix .\frontend run test:unit -- src/modules/stocks/StockCharts.spec.js` 21/21 通过，新增回归样本锁定两根 equality bar 仍能到 `TD卖9`；后端单测 `dotnet test .\backend\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~StockCopilotMcpServiceTests"` 4/4 通过，新增回归锁定 MCP `td` 信号计数为 9。Browser MCP 还补做了 backend-served 股票页 `http://localhost:5119/?tab=stock-info` 的最小验收：页面可加载、`sh600000` 查询成功、`TD九转` 文本可见、CopilotBrowser console 0 error。

tasks.title: Stock detail non-chart slimming and benchmark capture
tasks.notes: 2026-03-19 follow-up completed: `/api/stocks/detail` was slimmed into a non-chart summary endpoint that now returns quote + messages + optional fundamental snapshot only, while `StockSyncService.SaveDetailAsync(...)` keeps saving basic quote/profile/message data and no longer persists minute/K-line rows from the detail path. Browser MCP benchmark on `http://localhost:5119/` recorded first-open parallel fetch total at 6708ms, `detail-summary` at 2090ms, `chart-day` at 6705ms, and interval switches at `chart-month` 7ms / `chart-year` 4ms. A review follow-up then narrowed `/api/stocks/detail/cache` to summary-only by default as well, with legacy DB-backed chart replay preserved only behind explicit `includeLegacyCharts=true`, so the cache endpoint no longer silently resumes chart responsibilities. A later bottleneck pass confirmed the remaining visible chart delay was mostly caused by a redundant default quote fetch inside `/api/stocks/chart`, not by K-line retrieval itself; the stock terminal now requests `/api/stocks/chart` with `includeQuote=false`, and `月K/年K` also use `includeMinute=false`. A 2026-03-20 regression fix then restored first-open rendering for newly searched symbols with no cache/history by re-enabling `includeQuote=true` only when the workspace does not yet hold a quote, while already loaded workspaces still keep the lightweight refresh path. Cold-start runtime probe after restart showed `chart-day-cold-first` dropped to 467ms while standalone default `/api/stocks/quote` still took about 8815ms. Verification: `dotnet test .\backend\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests\SimplerJiangAiAgent.Api.Tests.csproj --filter "StockSyncServiceTests|HighFrequencyQuoteServiceTests|StockDetailCacheQueriesTests"` 9/9 passed, the expanded backend filter run passed 16/16, `npm --prefix .\frontend run test:unit -- src/modules/stocks/StockInfoTab.spec.js` later passed 46/46 after adding the no-cache first-open regression test, and Browser MCP page smoke check returned 0 console errors.

tasks.title: TradingAgents-style conversational workbench UI

tasks.title: Single-host single-process packaged runtime

tasks.notes: 已完成 Step 2、Step 2.1、Step 2.2、Step 2.3、Step 2.4、Step 2.5 与 Step 2.6：新增 LocalStockNews / LocalSectorReport 两张本地事实表与 Migration；新增 LocalFactIngestionWorker 定时采集东财公告、东财公司资料行业字段、Sina 公司新闻与本地资讯；新增 QueryLocalFactDatabaseTool，并让 A 股单标的 Stock Agents 默认走本地事实库、关闭外网搜索；新增 `/api/news?symbol={代码}&level=stock|sector|market`。Step 2.1 返工补充：修复 HTML/非 JSON LLM 响应容错、移除本地新闻/消息带硬截断、增加利好/中性/利空标签、修复 sector/market 并发刷新与展示、消息带支持点击打开详情，并将本地新闻卡片从 `news/impact` 成功条件中解耦。Step 2.2 补充：修复 TerminalView 高度被 AI 侧栏撑开的排版问题，修复侧栏切换时 K 线/分时图 resize 不及时与越界重叠问题，并为 OpenAI provider 增加 BaseUrl `/v1` 容错、完整请求 URI/头部诊断和可读网络异常；同时完成 Task 4 的标准/Pro 模型分流，普通分析默认切到 `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview-thinking-high`，前端新增 `Pro 深度分析` 触发，后端统一强制 Pro 路由到 `gemini-3.1-pro-preview-thinking-medium`，并对非 Pro 请求禁用 Pro 模型。Step 2.3 重做后：板块资讯改为新浪财经搜索页 HTML 定向抓取，不再依赖东财搜索 API；大盘环境改为 WSJ/NYT Business RSS 与新浪滚动宏观资讯合并落库；查询历史改为完整可滚动展示，不再硬截断。Step 2.4 新增 `LocalFactAiEnrichmentService`，按 5-20 条批量调用 `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` 清洗未处理的本地事实新闻，写入 `TranslatedTitle` / `AiSentiment` / `AiTarget` / `AiTags` / `IsAiProcessed`；LLM 失败时保持原始入库成功且默认 `中性`，并保留未处理状态以下轮重试；`/api/news` 改为展示 AI 清洗结果；Stock Agents 改为使用隔离投影，仅保留原题/译题/来源/时间，不携带这些廉价 AI 标签。Step 2.5 收口：大盘资讯改为页面流内嵌卡片并新增“展开阅读”弹窗，不再使用悬浮式 sticky 条带；外媒 RSS 读取增加时间戳去缓存、30 天硬时效过滤与严格倒序保留最新；`EnsureMarketFreshAsync` / `EnsureFreshAsync` 在“数据已新鲜”时仍会补跑 `IsAiProcessed=false` 的 market/stock/sector AI 重试。Step 2.6 收口：新浪大盘源切到纯财经流并过滤 `自媒体` 污染，失效 WSJ/NYT 改为 CNBC/Seeking Alpha/CoinTelegraph/TechCrunch/The Hill，新增 `/api/news/archive` 与 `全量资讯库` 标签页，支持关键字/层级/情绪筛选、分页、译题优先与原文跳转。验证通过：后端目标单测 14/14、前端单测 25/25、`npm run build`、SQL 结构校验、`node frontend/scripts/edge-check-goal013.mjs`。
